name: s2-eldercare-mmwave-monitor
author: Space2.world
short_description: A Life-Safety sensory tentacle for S2-SP-OS utilizing Micro-Doppler DSP. Includes a Secure Dry-Run actuator for Home Assistant to prevent accidental real-world device triggers.

environment_variables.S2_ENABLE_REAL_ACTUATION: Default: False. Set to 'True' to allow actual HTTP requests to physical hardware.
environment_variables.HA_BASE_URL: The REST API endpoint for Home Assistant (e.g., http://localhost:8123/api).
environment_variables.HA_BEARER_TOKEN: Long-lived access token for Home Assistant authentication.
